## Problem / motivation

What problem are you trying to solve? Who is affected and when?

## Proposed solution

A clear description of what you'd like to happen.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative approaches or workarounds you've thought about.

## Definition of done

- [ ] ...
- [ ] ...

## Additional context

Mockups, links, or references that help explain the request.
